title: Battle of Ajnadayn
description: The Battle of Ajnadayn was fought in July or August 634, in a location close to Bayt Jibrin; it was the first major pitched battle between the Byzantine (Roman) Empire and the army of the Arab Rashidun Caliphate. The result of the battle was a decisive Muslim victory.

location.name: southern Levant, near Bayt Jibrin (Eleutheropolis) in present-day Israel
